body: PT Harta Djaya Karya Tbk (MEJA) saw its stock price surge 179.79% since its debut on February 12, 2024, with a current market capitalization of IDR 586.75 billion and a transaction value of IDR 24 billion. Despite the stock's strong performance, the company's net profit in H1 2024 was IDR 2.38 billion, only 32.58% of its 2023 net profit, and revenue reached IDR 22.69 billion, equal to 49.82% of its 2023 revenue.
title: PT Harta Djaya Karya's stock surges 179.79% since debut despite modest profit growth in H1 2024.

body: The Indonesia Stock Exchange listed the top 5 issuers with the highest transaction values in November 2024, with PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia Tbk (BBRI) leading the pack with a transaction value of IDR 26.57 trillion, accounting for 11.34% of the total transaction value of IDR 234.30 trillion. The other top issuers included PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) with IDR 17.98 trillion, PT Bank Mandiri Tbk (BMRI) with IDR 15.54 trillion, PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk with IDR 13.12 trillion, and PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) with IDR 13.06 trillion.
title: Indonesia Stock Exchange Lists Top 5 Issuers with Highest Transaction Values in November 2024

body: The market capitalization of the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) decreased by 5.36% in November 2024, with a total market cap of IDR 12 quadrillion and listed shares of 11.88 trillion, down from IDR 12.69 quadrillion in October 2024. The top 50 issuers accounted for 75.83% of the total market cap, with a collective value of IDR 9.04 quadrillion, led by blue-chip stocks such as PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA), PT Bank Mandiri Tbk (BMRI), and PT Telkom Indonesia Tbk (TLKM).
title: Indonesian Stock Exchange Market Capitalization Shrinks 5.36% in November 2024

body: The Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) surged 1.45% or 102.18 points to 7,149.17 in today's morning session, driven by price increases in nearly all sectors, particularly the technology sector, which contributed 2.58% growth. PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) led the top gainers with a 5.71% price jump, while transaction value reached IDR 5.26 trillion and volume clocked up 9.83 billion shares.
title: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index Rises 1.45% to 7,149.17 in Morning Session

body: Bain Capital Credit LP, through its affiliate BCSS Maverick Holdings LP, plans to invest USD 157 million in PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya TBK (SRAJ) through a private placement securities issuance, with USD 32 million allocated for share takeover and USD 125 million for securities acquisition. The investment plan has been approved by independent shareholders, with the agreements signed last week, marking a significant investment in SRAJ by unaffiliated investors.
title: Bain Capital Credit to Invest USD 157 Million in PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya TBK through Private Placement.

body: Foreign investors sold a net IDR 1.27 trillion worth of shares in Indonesian banks on Monday, with PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia Tbk (BBRI), PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA), and PT Bank Negara Indonesia Tbk (BBNI) being the top three banking issuers on the foreign net sell list. The Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) fell 0.95% to 7,046.98, with banking stocks being the top laggards, led by BBCA, which fell 2.50%, followed by PT Bank Mandiri Tbk, BBRI, and BBNI.
title: Foreign Investors Net Sell Indonesian Banking Stocks, Led by Bank Rakyat Indonesia and Bank Central Asia

body: Foreign investors sold a net 640 million shares in Indonesian markets, with PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia TBK (GOTO) and PT Bumi Resources TBK (BUMI) being the top sells, while PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur TBK (ASTR) and PT Multipolar TBK (MLPL) were the top buys. The net foreign sell volume was led by digital and coal mining companies, with banking sector shares also being sold, including PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia TBK (BBRI) and PT Bank Central Asia TBK (BBCA).
title: Foreign investors in Indonesia sell 4.03 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at -640 million shares.

body: PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) is securing a loan facility to fund the construction of an underground mine in Palu, Central Sulawesi, aiming to process ores with higher gold concentrations by end-2027. The company reported a 231% year-on-year revenue surge to USD 108.47 million in Q3 2024, with a 54% increase in net profit to USD 16.43 million, driven by the operation of its gold ore refineries.
title: PT Bumi Resources Minerals to Secure Loan for Underground Mine Construction in Central Sulawesi.

body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia Tbk (BNI) has collaborated with the Indonesian Disabled People Association to empower people with disabilities through its Agen46 program, aiming to increase financial inclusion and provide equal opportunities for economic growth. Through this program, 65 people with disabilities have become Agen46 partners, enabling them to access financial services and earn additional income, aligning with the government's efforts to promote financial inclusion and sustainable economic development.
title: BNI Collaborates with Indonesian Disabled People Association to Empower People with Disabilities through Financial Inclusion Program.

body: The Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index fell 1.13% to 7,114.26, dragged down by mining companies such as PT Alamtri Resources Indonesia Tbk (-44.53%), PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (-10.24%), and others. On the other hand, PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk led the gainers with a 9.45% increase, while PT Bayan Resources Tbk was the only mining company among the top performers, with total transaction volume and value rising 31.23% and 35.53%, respectively.
title: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index Falls 1.13% as Mining Companies Weigh Down Growth.

body: PT Alamtri Resources Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) saw a 44.53% decline in its stock price within a week, closing at IDR 2,080 per share, with foreign investors registering a net sell of 150.63 million shares, resulting in a net foreign sell of 205.94 million shares within the week. The stock was listed as one of the top losers on the Indonesia Stock Exchange, with a transaction value of IDR 4.22 trillion, and the decline was predicted by PT Stockbit Sekuritas Digital due to the ex-date dividend and public offering to shareholders.
title: PT Alamtri Resources Indonesia's stock price plummets 44.53% in a week, driven by foreign investors' selling spree.

body: PT Newport Marine Services Tbk (BOAT) raised IDR 100.05 billion from its initial public offering of 1 billion shares and has seen a net buy of 8 million shares from foreign investors since its debut on the Indonesia Stock Exchange on November 12, 2024. Despite a recent 18.88% decline in share price to IDR 232 per share, the company's stock has increased 68.12% since its debut.
title: Foreign investors snap up PT Newport Marine Services' shares after Indonesian stock market debut.
